content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad risk-off session: NIFTY -1.38%, IT crashing -5.49%, VIX +6% to 19.71. Book is 68% deployed with mild unrealized loss. Late session (14:11, ~80 min to close) on a weak tape is not an accumulation window. Focus is position management, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -5.7% but thesis intact per Q4 beat (PAT +35% YoY, credit +22%). CMP 76.84 above SL 74.50 — let SL handle risk. Price is consolidating near VWAP 76.60 after sharp rally earlier this week. No MODIFY since SL already defined; tightening here would be too close to noise range."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1013.22,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD — P&L +4.5%, stock at 1034.60 making fresh intraday highs on strong post-Q4 momentum. Current SL 1013.22 is already near breakeven (entry 984) protecting gains. No change needed; target 1100 still valid given MOFSL PT 1143. Emitting as HOLD position_action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -0.8% minor loss, VIX rising supports holding gold exposure. SL 119 gives room for normal volatility. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1410.00,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.7%, stock at fresh 52w high 1417.90 on FMCG defensive rotation. Tighten SL from 1405 to 1410 (just below entry 1412.94, essentially breakeven) to lock in gains given binary event risk (Nestle already reported, but FMCG peers reporting this week). Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to breakeven (entry 1049.05). Stock hit 52w high 1079.55 intraday but faded to 1054.50 — relative strength vs banking sector evident but Q4 audited results on Apr 27 is binary event risk. Lock in zero-loss risk profile ahead of results. Target unchanged at 1130."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, results Apr 29 (binary event 3 trading days away). SL 672 is 1.8% below CMP — tightening further would be too close to today's range low 682. Consensus target band Rs 587-687 suggests stock near top of range; will reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.6%, down sharply today (-2.41%) after FMCG rally stalled. SL 2260 is ~2.2% below CMP — within risk budget. Board meeting Apr 30 is key catalyst. Not tightening because today's volatility would whipsaw out; giving thesis room into results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.0%, tight intraday range 399-405, VWAP 400.65. SL 393 (2.8% below CMP) appropriate. Q4 results May 15 is outside max hold window — may need to re-evaluate before then. No change now."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 74.50 well placed below today's low 75.75; thesis intact per Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1013.22 (above entry 984) — breakeven+ protection locked in. Target 1100 still in play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive exposure, SL 119 gives appropriate volatility room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1410.00,
      "reasoning": "Nudging SL to near-breakeven (1410 vs entry 1412.94) — effectively zero-risk hold at fresh 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to breakeven ahead of Apr 27 Q4 results. Removes downside risk while leaving upside open."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 672 intact, results Apr 29. Will reassess post-print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Choppy FMCG tape; giving thesis room into Apr 30 earnings. SL 2260 is the line."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight intraday range, SL 393 appropriate. Q4 May 15."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUBANK, PNBHOUSING momentum intact but already held — no adds. DRREDDY surged on Canada semaglutide news but Biocon competition threatens first-mover economics; avoid chasing. OFSS +0.24% on 7.6x volume is noteworthy IT divergence but already up ~8% post-Q4 — waiting for pullback. SCHAEFFLER just ex-div today + Q1 results Apr 29 — binary event, pass. NAVINFLUOR, BRITANNIA, HSCL, EMCURE, ONESOURCE all have results in next 5 days — no entries on event risk. RELIANCE and INDUSINDBK both reporting today post-market — explicit NO_ACTION before binary event.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed — near the hysteresis threshold where default disposition shifts to NO_ACTION on new entries. 8 existing CNC positions with mixed P&L (total -17 net). NIFTY -1.38% with VIX +6% is a classic risk-off session — not a day to add beta. Cluster exposure check: Financials = MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK ≈ 26% of capital — at the caution line, no more financial adds. Focus this cycle: trailing SLs on winners (NESTLEIND, AUBANK to breakeven) and letting losers sit against their stops. Will revisit tomorrow AM after RELIANCE/INDUSINDBK Q4 and global cues digest."
}
